text: I feel as if I am at the boundary between contemplation and creation. The first image shows a meeting or presentation through glass—the world of collaboration, learning, and perhaps a sense of slight distance or anticipation. The second image brings me into an exhibit celebrating research and development, where bold colors and words spark curiosity. Taken together, I sense a place of ideas, inquiry, and the energy of innovation, but also the quiet space of observation from the edge.
